error.signature: tensorflow.python.framework.errors_impl.NotFoundError: Unsuccessful TensorSliceReader: Failed to get matching files on /path/to/model/checkpoint
error.regex: (Unsuccessful TensorSliceReader|Failed to get matching files.*checkpoint|NotFoundError.*checkpoint|checkpoint.*not found|SavedModel.*not found|No checkpoint found)

verdict.summary: Checkpoint file missing, path wrong, or only partial checkpoint files present (missing .index or .data).

dead_ends.action: Download only the .ckpt file without .index and .data-00000-of-00001
dead_ends.why_fails: TF checkpoints are split into 3 files (.index, .data-00000-of-00001, checkpoint). All are required.

dead_ends.action: Change file extension from .ckpt to .h5 or vice versa
dead_ends.why_fails: These are completely different formats. .ckpt is TF-native, .h5 is HDF5. They are not interchangeable by renaming.

workarounds.how: ls model_dir/  # must have: checkpoint, model.ckpt.index, model.ckpt.data-00000-of-00001

workarounds.action: Use tf.train.latest_checkpoint() to find the correct path
Use SavedModel format instead of checkpoints for portability
